name: Grand Alliance Order: Crusaders
inspire: Immediately after a Power step, if your warband holds 2 or more treasure tokens in enemy territory, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Pioneers
reactions.trigger: Immediately after a friendly fighter finishes a Move within 1 hex of a treasure token, you can push that fighter 1 hex.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately after a friendly fighter finishes a Move within 1 hex of a treasure token, you can push that fighter 1 hex. That push must end on a treasure token.

abilities.name: Staunch Defender
abilities.flavorText: Defenders of civilisation will sell their lives to protect mortalkind's treasures from destruction and desecration.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter holding a treasure token. Until the end of the next turn, that fighter's Save characteristic is 3 {icon:shield}. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Zealous Resolve
abilities.flavorText: Those who believe in the ideals of justice will never yield an inch of ground to the servants of evil.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Until the end of the next turn, friendly fighters cannot be driven back or pushed. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Reclaim Ground
abilities.flavorText: The mantra of Order's champions is simple: we will recover what was taken from us, whatever it takes.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter. Until the end of the next turn, melee Attack rolls made for that fighter as part of melee Attacks always count as having more {icon:fury} than the Save roll for the purposes of Drive Back and Overrun. This ability can only be used once per game.
